perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a woman in a pink tracksuit standing inside a large white event tent, gesturing enthusiastically to the camera. (2) She begins walking through the tent, which is lined with tables filled with various merchandise including bags, food items, and clothing. (3) The camera follows her as she stops to highlight specific items: heart-shaped charms, Christmas-themed gift bags, colorful blankets, and tins of egg rolls. (4) Throughout the tour, she interacts with the products, showing their textures and pointing to price signs. (5) The video concludes with a fast-paced montage of the various product displays and shelves within the tent.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, fast-paced electronic background track begins immediately. (2) A high-pitched, energetic female vocal greets the audience and begins a continuous narration of the scene. (3) Occasional low-pitched male interjections are heard off-screen, responding to the woman. (4) Short, sharp sound effects like chimes or camera shutter sounds accompany the appearance of text on screen. (5) The music and high-energy narration remain consistent until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '2025 haha baby 擁抱點點路跑 RUN' - Main event branding and title. (2) '大家早安啊' - Friendly greeting to viewers. (3) '有夠早 (現在時間早上9:00)' - Contextual note about the early start time. (4) '結帳區', '保健食品區', '懶人毛毯', '市集優惠' - Functional labels identifying sections and product names. (5) '一起來逛逛' - Call to action at the end of the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Detailed Product Showcase -> Outro Montage

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator on screen, 1 male cameraperson's hands visible occasionally.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a pink hooded tracksuit (jacket and shorts) with white sneakers and patterned socks.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large white marquee tent, organized with rows of white-clothed tables, clothing racks, and shelves packed with colorful merchandise.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and preview the merchandise available at the 'haha baby 2025 Road Run' event market. The video serves as a guided tour to build anticipation and encourage sales by demonstrating product variety and highlighting special event pricing.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is showcasing her own brand's products at a brand-specific event.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interactive hosting style, rapid product turnover editing.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This video utilizes standard influencer marketing techniques, blending a personal vlog style with high-pressure promotional editing to create a sense of urgency and community engagement.
